title: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don’t mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it’s not good to be judgy.
notes: Choosing [gold]Keep the Key[/gold] transitions to a second page where you confirm the fight. You then enter combat against the Mysterious Knight. Winning rewards the [blue]Lantern Key[/blue] card as a special card reward. The event does not resume after combat ends.
